abstract: Gene Patrick "Corky" Corcoran (July 28, 1924 – October 3, 1979) was an American jazz tenor saxophonist.

concerts.label: Harry James and His Orchestra, and Nina Simone, Singer

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Radke
about_quotes.evidence: Corky Corcoran and I have become very close, roommates... Sonny, Corky, myself, and it was kind of, I was in that kind of a different clique
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Radke interviewed by Monk Rowe, Hillsdale, Michigan, November 8, 2023
